title: Error 422 (safe) mod
body:
Error 422 Mod (Alpha 1.0.0): Safe and Enjoyable
The Error 422 mod for Minecraft Alpha 1.0.0 takes inspiration from the myth of the original Error 422 but offers a safe and controlled experience. Unlike the chaotic, dangerous version from the legend, this mod focuses on providing a stable and fun addition to the game. It introduces four key features—a new item tab, block, mob, and music disk—that expand gameplay without any risks or unpredictability.
